title: Health Assistant
subtitle: Your AI-powered health companion
greeting: Hello! How can I help you today?
placeholder: Type your question or describe your symptoms...

examples.title: Try asking:
examples.symptom_1: I have a headache and fever
examples.symptom_2: What should I do for a cough?
examples.medication: When should I take my medication?
examples.general: What are the symptoms of malaria?

disclaimer.title: Important Notice
disclaimer.message: This assistant provides general health information and is not a replacement for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
disclaimer.emergency: If you have a medical emergency, call 114 immediately.

responses.emergency_detected: Your symptoms may indicate an emergency condition.
responses.see_doctor: Based on your symptoms, we recommend consulting a healthcare provider.
responses.self_care: You can try these self-care measures:
responses.monitor: Monitor your symptoms. If they worsen, seek medical attention.
responses.not_medical_advice: This is not a medical diagnosis. Please consult a healthcare professional for proper evaluation.

limitations.title: What I Can't Do
limitations.no_replacement: • I am not a replacement for a doctor

empty_state.title: Ask me anything about your health
